sql_array: CREATE TABLE webshop.products (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), price DECIMAL(10, 2), stock INT);
INSERT INTO webshop.products (id, name, price, stock) VALUES (1, 'Product A', 19.99, 100);
UPDATE webshop.products SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT name, price FROM webshop.products WHERE stock > 0;
CREATE TABLE webshop.orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, product_id INT, quantity INT, FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES webshop.products(id));
